title: Mork Borg: The Box of Terrors
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Bmjis1ofzE

Daniel (@dungeondive) reviews the Box of Terrors by Phil Reed, a storage box designed to hold Mork Borg zines that includes multiple supplements. The box itself functions as a bestiary where rolling a D6 inside determines encounters, and it comes with poster-sized adventures, fold-out maps, bookmark items, and a D12 skeletal encounter table. He explores the creative but sometimes difficult-to-use poster format while celebrating Mork Borg's willingness to embrace unconventional design.

----

How do you organize your growing collection of Mork Borg supplements and zines, and have any organizational tools been game-changers for your table?
